title: Hot dog of undying
body:
# ***Hot dog of undying***

## We will turn your totems into **HOT DOGS!**

> *Hot dog cooked one morning saved my life...*

- This resource pack replaces: hot dog totem model, models in: inventory, right hand, totem model on the ground and totem model in a frame.

*Bon appetit!*
##### This is my first resource pack, don't beat me up ;-;
